summary: iOS | OSPREY | Popup about update for Charge Case appears after launching the app
scenario: Brief Charge Case firmware update popup appears momentarily after app launch on Voyager Free 60+ despite updates being handled via the mobile app
description_clean: After pairing Poly Voyager Free 60+ with the app, if the Charge Case is on outdated firmware, a popup about updating the Charge Case appears briefly (for a split second) after launching the app. This popup should not appear for the Free 60+ charge case since firmware updates for it can be performed via the mobile app.
steps: 1. Pair the Poly Voyager Free 60+ with the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure the Charge Case is on outdated firmware.
3. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Observe the Home screen for any popup related to updating the Charge Case.
expected: No popup about updating the Charge Case should appear, since firmware updates for the Free 60+ charge case can be performed via the mobile app.
actual: A popup about updating the Charge Case appears briefly (for a split second) after launching the app.
